items.title: Countries airlift nationals evacuated from virus-hit cruise ship
items.summary: Spanish passengers are the first to leave the MV Hondius, after an outbreak saw three people die and several infected.

items.title: Army parachutes onto remote island to help Briton with suspected hantavirus
items.summary: The specialist team parachuted onto Tristan da Cunha, a remote British overseas territory, to treat them.

items.title: Iran sends response to US proposals to end war
items.summary: No details have been released of Iran's response - or the US proposals - designed to bring the war to an end.

items.title: Retail spending fell in March as consumers pull back
items.summary: Spending at US retailers fell in March as consumers pulled back amid recessionary fears fueled by the banking crisis.
